diagrams.title: CAF System Context
diagrams.purpose: Shows CAF in relation to enterprises, federations, architects, governance bodies, systems and external standards.

diagrams.title: CAS Portfolio Package Diagram
diagrams.purpose: Organizes the main CAS series as architecture packages and shows their dependencies.

diagrams.title: Core Domain Class Model
diagrams.purpose: Defines the principal architecture entities and their structural relationships.

diagrams.title: Federation Domain Class Model
diagrams.purpose: Models ecosystem participants, federation agreements, shared capabilities, boundaries and governance.

diagrams.title: Distributed Governance Component Diagram
diagrams.purpose: Shows governance boards, policy services, decision-rights registry, exception handling and assurance integration.

diagrams.title: Semantic and Knowledge Class Model
diagrams.purpose: Combines canonical concepts, local concepts, mappings, knowledge assets, provenance, evidence and stewardship.

diagrams.title: Trust and Assurance Class Model
diagrams.purpose: Models evidence-based trust, assurance claims, controls, findings and confidence assessments.

diagrams.title: Federated Cognitive and Reasoning Components
diagrams.purpose: Shows human, AI and analytical participants coordinated through reasoning, knowledge, trust and governance services.

diagrams.title: Collective Reasoning Sequence Diagram
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates a complete reasoning cycle from observation to decision and knowledge feedback.

diagrams.title: Autonomy Lifecycle State Machine
diagrams.purpose: Defines controlled progression, suspension, rollback and revocation of delegated autonomy.

diagrams.title: Continuous Assurance Activity Diagram
diagrams.purpose: Shows how objectives, evidence, verification, confidence, findings and corrective action form a closed loop.

diagrams.title: Federation Intelligence Pipeline
diagrams.purpose: Shows the transformation from distributed observations into coordinated action, learning and adaptation.

diagrams.title: Federated Reference Deployment
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates a technology-neutral deployment topology for multiple organizations and shared federation services.

diagrams.title: Architecture Review and Approval Sequence
diagrams.purpose: Shows proposal, automated conformance, domain review, board decision, exception handling and publication.

diagrams.title: Standards Traceability Model
diagrams.purpose: Shows end-to-end traceability from strategic intent through principles, requirements, controls, evidence and architecture decisions.
